title: Crispy Cantonese Vegetable Toast
description: A light, salty, kid-friendly Cantonese toast topped with a crunchy mix of diced vegetables, finished with a savory soy-sesame glaze.
instructions: In a small bowl mix the diced carrots, celery, bell pepper, onion, and minced garlic with soy sauce, sesame oil, white pepper, and a pinch of sugar if using.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add the vegetable shortening until melted.
Add the vegetable mixture to the skillet and sauté for 3-4 minutes until tender but still crisp.
While the veggies cook, toast the bread slices in a toaster or on a separate pan until golden brown.
When the vegetables are ready, spread them evenly over each toasted slice.
Sprinkle chopped scallions and toasted sesame seeds over the top for added texture and flavor.
Optional: Drizzle a little extra sesame oil over the assembled toast before serving.
Plate the toast slices and serve immediately for best crunch.
If desired, cut the toast into small bite-sized pieces for younger kids.
